module.name: no-inline-type-import
module.description: Disallow TypeScript inline type imports using import("...").

scenarios.name: should allow a top-level import type statement
should allow a standard runtime import
should report an inline type annotation using import("...")
scenarios.given: a type annotation typed as import('./module').SomeType
scenarios.then: a noInlineTypeImport violation is reported with a fix to add or reuse a top-level import type when the imported type name is collision-free
